results.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Reports Second Quarter and Year-to-Date Operating Results for Fiscal 2026 and February Sales Results
results.snippet: Costco reported Q2 fiscal 2026 net sales of $68.24 billion, up 9.1 percent year-over-year. Net income increased to $2.035 billion, or $4.58 per diluted share.

results.title: Costco Wholesale Corp (COST) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
results.snippet: In Q2 2026, Costco's net sales rose 9.1% to $68.24 billion and net income grew to $2.035 billion. EPS increased to $4.58 from $4.02 in the prior year.

results.title: COST Q2 2026 revenue, earnings and cash flow rise
results.snippet: Costco's Q2 2026 revenue increased 9% to $69.6 billion while net income reached $2.0 billion. Comparable sales grew by 7% with EPS at $4.58.

results.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation - Investor Relations
results.snippet: Costco released its Q2 and year-to-date operating results for fiscal 2026 on March 5, 2026. The investor site provides access to the full earnings report and upcoming events.

results.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Q2 2026 Earnings Recap
results.snippet: Costco's Q2 2026 net income rose nearly 14% to $2.035 billion with EPS of $4.58. Net sales grew 9.1% to $68.24 billion driven by strong comparable and digital sales growth.

results.title: Top 10 COSTCO Deals You NEED To Buy in March 2026 (and what to skip)
results.snippet: This video reviews Costco's March 2026 coupon book highlighting top deals like Perfect Bars, Ninja Crispi Air Fryer, and Suja Immune Shots while noting which promotions may not be worth purchasing.

results.title: March 2026 Costco U.S. Savings Book Preview: Instant Savings
results.snippet: Reddit users preview the March 2026 Costco U.S. Savings Book with member-only instant savings valid from March 2 to March 29 across warehouse and online purchases.

results.title: COSTCO NEW ARRIVALS & GREAT DEALS for MARCH 2026 (3/16)
results.snippet: A shopping vlog from a Southern California Costco showcases new arrivals and standout deals available during March 2026.

results.title: The upcoming Costco March 2026 Coupon Book is here!
results.snippet: This Instagram post details select offers from the Costco March 2026 Coupon Book including discounts on Protein Pop Plus, StriVectin serum, and Neutrogena makeup wipes.

results.title: Warehouse Savings
results.snippet: Costco's warehouse savings page features ongoing promotions on mattresses, appliances and more, following March 2026 sales with current validity into early May 2026.

results.title: Costco (COST) Stock Predictions for 2026 and Beyond
results.snippet: Some analysts estimate more than 9% upside in 2026 with a range of $769-$1,210 and an average 12-month price target of $1,076 according to TipRanks.

results.title: Costco (COST) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions ...
results.snippet: 19 analysts rate Costco (COST) as a Buy with a 2026 price prediction of $1,078.32 as of April 2026.

results.title: Costco Wholesale (COST) Stock Forecast & Price Target
results.snippet: Analysts predict Costco Wholesale stock has a 5.78% upside based on their 12-month stock forecasts.

results.title: Costco Is Up 4%. Could Shares Push Toward $1200 in 2026
results.snippet: A valuation model estimates a target price of $1,174 for Costco implying 19% upside into 2026. The stock carries a Moderate Buy consensus with an average target of about $1,006.

results.title: Costco Stock Forecast 2026–2030 | Future Outlook
results.snippet: Third-party Costco stock predictions as of early 2026 cluster around the low-to-mid $1,000s with targets ranging from $1,000 to $1,155.
